title: Training Composer 2
summary: Cursor's Composer 2 is built on top of Kimi K2.5 (256K context, 1T parameters) with continued coding-focused pre-training and long-horizon reinforcement learning. The model uses reward shaping with nonlinear length penalties and self-summarization to handle extended rollouts, bootstrapped by auto-install exploration in training environments.
